name: emw-relion-symmetrize_volume
help: Apply point-group symmetry to a volume using relion_image_handler --symmetrize. Input: a Volume. Output: symmetrized Volume.

params.name: relion_image_handler.i
params.label: Input volume:
params.help: Input volume (MRC/MRCs) to symmetrize. This will be passed as --i to relion_image_handler.

params.name: relion_image_handler.sym
params.label: Symmetry:
params.help: Symmetry group to apply (e.g. C1, C2, C3, D2, I1, I2, I3, I4). Passed as --sym to relion_image_handler. For asymmetric volumes use C1.
